name: Daily Brief (AI Inbox)
description: Generates the Daily Brief from the AI Inbox, uses a fallback if Claude is unavailable, marks captures as Briefed, and maintains the task loop.

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $('Prepare').first().json.items || [];
return items.filter(i => i.id).map(i => ({ json: { id: i.id } }));

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: 'Daily Brief - degradation

Engine: ' + $json.engine + '
Context: ' + $json.context_source + '
Date: ' + $json.date + '

' + ($json.context_source !== 'notion' ? 'The System Context page is unavailable; no static profile was injected. ' : '') + ($json.engine !== 'claude' ? 'A fallback engine was used.' : '') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ date: $('Prepare').first().json.date, engine: $('Brief fallback if Claude fails').first().json.engine || 'none', context_source: $('Brief fallback if Claude fails').first().json.context_source || 'missing' }) }}
